programme.title: The Way Home
programme.desc: Kat and Elliot plan a romantic getaway, while Alice tries to gather more clues; Del and Sam get a surprise visit from Elliot's father, Vic.

programme.title: Autumn at Apple Hill
programme.desc: Newly divorced Elise starts renovating the inn she inherited from her grandparents and catches the eye of Luke, the chief financial officer of a major hotel chain.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates reminisce about the adventures they have shared.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy becomes romantically interested in Frank Leahy, a fellow teacher whom she later discovers is a priest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Angela Petrillo pays a return visit to Miami, making her sister's life miserable.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: After attending a sorority reunion, Blanche considers having a face lift.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: One of Dorothy's pupils may face deportation, and she feels responsible.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates reminisce about the adventures they have shared.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy becomes romantically interested in Frank Leahy, a fellow teacher whom she later discovers is a priest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Angela Petrillo pays a return visit to Miami, making her sister's life miserable.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: After attending a sorority reunion, Blanche considers having a face lift.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: One of Dorothy's pupils may face deportation, and she feels responsible.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean overwhelm Cheyenne with advice when she plans her second wedding to Van; Cheyenne tries to call off the wedding.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is rushed to the hospital after collapsing at Van and Cheyenne's non-wedding; Van and Cheyenne question their marriage.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean shows off her new sleek figure and staunch dedication to the gym, which Brock fears is about spending time with her male trainer.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Houston's premier real estate agent contacts Reba and Van for a meeting, exciting Reba but concerning Van that he will be her assistant.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Van builds a new home office in the garage so he and Reba can be more productive, but Reba has a difficult time juggling family and the additional workload.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra moves back in with Reba, who catches her drinking; Brock and Barbra Jean confess that they let Kyra have an occasional beer in their house.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Van end their real estate partnership; Barbra Jean auditions to be the new weather girl at a local TV station.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba deals with Kyra and Cheyenne, who are at odds because Kyra feels her sister can not get enough of the family spotlight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Through a series of flashbacks, the housemates reminisce about their birthday celebrations.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The women try to help a neighborhood couple, George and Renee Corliss, patch up their faltering marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia's new friend, an elderly gentleman, has Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The housemates recall some of their absurd moneymaking schemes.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: But Not as Cute as Pushkin
programme.desc: Rory is delighted that her former headmaster asks her to host a girl who is thinking of applying to Yale; Lorelai and Luke have their first fight when she buys an old boat that had belonged to his father.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Christopher goes to Yale in hopes of mending his relationship with Rory, but she rebuffs his attempt at reconciliation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory is disappointed when Logan doesn't invite her to be his date at a book-signing party thrown by his father; Richard spies Emily talking to a former flame and rear-ends her car, forcing an opportunity for reconciliation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: Optimistic and cheerful TV producer Kelly doesn't have time for love. Bad boy celebrity chef Stephen doesn't have time for anything besides cooking. Fun with a side of love ensues as Kelly and Stephen are paired on a children's cooking show.

programme.title: An American in Austen
programme.desc: Magically transported into the story of "Pride and Prejudice," a librarian gets the chance to discover if any man can compare to Mr. Darcy.

programme.title: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: A teacher learns that her boyfriend isn't an author from Great Britain, but the prince of a small country called St. Ives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: An event planner must organize the perfect wedding for her sister in less than a month when she finds out that the Rosewood, a historic inn and beloved wedding venue, is being sold.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche announces that she is canceling a date with her latest boyfriend, because he does not meet her standards.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy dismays when her daughter is too forgiving of her unfaithful husband.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: When two police officers set up surveillance equipment in Blanche's house, Dorothy, Rose, Blanche and Sophia are more interested in snaring the policemen.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Through a series of flashbacks, the housemates reminisce about their birthday celebrations.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: While the family makes Thanksgiving preparations, John-Boy awaits a visit from his girlfriend (Sian Barbara Allen).

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A severe head injury, which prevented John-Boy from taking his college entrance exams, now requires surgery.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Van builds a new home office in the garage so he and Reba can be more productive, but Reba has a difficult time juggling family and the additional workload.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra moves back in with Reba, who catches her drinking; Brock and Barbra Jean confess that they let Kyra have an occasional beer in their house.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Van end their real estate partnership; Barbra Jean auditions to be the new weather girl at a local TV station.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba deals with Kyra and Cheyenne, who are at odds because Kyra feels her sister can not get enough of the family spotlight.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra posts a video of Van on the Internet; Reba advises Brock to make a romantic gesture in order to save his marriage.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean suspects that the station's new intern was brought in to be her successor.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba discovers that Brock has been living secretly in the garage for several days to spend time apart from Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba finds the perfect first home for Cheyenne and Van, but Cheyenne discovers that her high-school rival is selling it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose, concerned about the nuclear arms race, mails letters to President Reagan and Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A political candidate announces that he had an affair with Blanche, a contention that she denies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy makes her ex-husband, Stanley Zbornak, jealous when she has an affair with his brother Theodore.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's cousin, Sven Lindstrom, arrives from Sweden and falls in love with Blanche.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: After Richard and Emily renew their vows, Lorelai, Luke and Christopher find Rory and Logan together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: After the disastrous scene at the wedding, Lorelai begs Luke not to give up on their relationship, and his decision to be alone leaves her devastated.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: When Luke agrees to build sets for the elementary school's production of "Fiddler on the Roof," he knows that Lorelai is the costume designer and hopes that their paths will cross.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sand Dollar Cove
programme.desc: A real estate developer travels to a quaint seaside town to convince a charming local to sell his beachfront property. As she tries to figure out a way to make the deal work, the undeniable attraction between them continues to grow.

programme.title: June in January
programme.desc: When her fiance (Wes Brown) receives a job offer, a woman (Brooke D'Orsay) must suddenly plan her wedding in three weeks.

programme.title: A Season to Blossom
programme.desc: A drifting aspiring writer returns to sell her late grandmother's bookstore, but its traditions and her childhood crush helps her rediscover her voice, her roots, and a love worth staying for.

programme.title: The Wish Swap
programme.desc: When Casey and Henry find themselves celebrating their birthdays at the same restaurant, they make birthday wishes at the same time which are granted. However, they end up getting each other's wishes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The housemates could earn $100,000 if they adopt an elderly pig.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Courtesy of their new housekeeper's magic potions, Blanche's social life perks up and Dorothy wins the battle against insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: Nothing to Fear but Fear Itself
programme.desc: The women confront their phobias on a flight to the Bahamas to attend a funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose, concerned about the nuclear arms race, mails letters to President Reagan and Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A political candidate announces that he had an affair with Blanche, a contention that she denies.
